sources.snippet: NVDA this week's PCR ratio is under 0.75 (both OI and Volume) means bullish sentiment. Highest number of Call Open Interest (over 10,000) as well as highest Put open interest (over 5000) is for strike price of atleast $800 so can we not assume that the market sentiment is that it will go to atleast

sources.title: Daily Chat Thread and Discussion : r/NVDA_Stock - Reddit
sources.snippet: Zoom out. I'll focus on 06/27/2027, and 06/27/2034 as a goal instead. Will continue with DCA accumulation. Bullish on this solid, innovative company, NVIDIA. Its long-term strong stock performance will follow IMHO.
